title: From the Archives | World Water Day
description: Water is not just a resource; it is also the confluence of political and ecological realities. At CPR, this has been central to our interdisciplinary work on river basin management, interstate cooperation, the politics of infrastructure, federalism, and long-term water security. Our continued engagement with questions of India’s water policy spans decades, with stalwarts like Ramaswamy R. Iyer, […] The post From the Archives | World Water Day appeared first on CPR.
